meaning: vt.(通过广告和推销)预售,向...预售
examples: The authorities know that a large number of realtors ignore the rule and presell under the table.
The objection of this transaction and the content of the contract is special. To presell the apartment, the seller must obtain some basic conditions.

Schamus cooked up a plan to presell the movie at the 2011 Cannes Film Festival, that May.
"You have to presell it on buzz, " Mr. Philips said.
